xEnglish: GCA security boundary update is ready for review.
GCA contract facts are public: fixed supply, verified source, no blacklist, no pause, no transfer tax, and no hidden mint path.
Current boundary: no completed third-party audit yet. BaseScan token profile publication is still pending official review, while the owner package was refreshed on 2026-06-06.
Official links first. No price or return claim.
xChinese: GCA 安全边界更新已准备好审核。
GCA 合约事实是公开的：固定供应、源码已验证、无黑名单、无暂停、无转账税、无隐藏增发路径。
当前边界：第三方审计尚未完成。BaseScan 公开代币资料仍等待官方审核，owner 提交包已在 2026-06-06 刷新。
先核对官方链接。不做价格或收益承诺。
telegram: GCA Security Boundary update is ready for operator review.
Public contract facts: fixed supply, verified source, no blacklist, no pause, no transfer tax, and no hidden mint path.
Current boundary: no completed third-party audit yet, and BaseScan token profile publication is still pending official review. Verify official links first: https://gcagochina.com/security.html
nextPublishAction.visualTheme: Red GCA mark beside a contract-controls checklist and external-audit pending marker.
nextPublishAction.claimBoundary: Security-boundary education only; no price, return, audit-completion, BaseScan approval, wallet-vendor approval, listing, or market-prediction claim.

operatorChecklist: Open the official X profile only: https://x.com/GCAAIGoChina
Confirm the post link points to the official website and not a copied or shortened link.
Confirm the network wording stays Base Mainnet / chainId 8453.
Confirm the official market route remains GCA/USDT.
Confirm the text does not claim third-party audit completion.
Confirm the text does not claim BaseScan token profile approval.
Confirm the text does not make price, return, listing, or market-prediction claims.
After publishing, record the new post URL in announcements.json and community.json before the next site update.

postPublishLedgerUpdate.action: Add the published X post URL, date, channel, and message to publishedPosts.
Update latestPostUrl and safeAnnouncement if the post should become a community reference.
Keep announcementHub.latestPostUrl aligned when the latest public X post changes.
No token-list change is required unless official links, route, or public status changes.

doNotPublish: return promises, price targets, market predictions, or unsupported investment-style claims
third-party audit completion before an independent report is public
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval before the vendor confirms it
LP lock, reserve lock, buyback, or price-support claim before evidence exists
any request for private keys, seed phrases, exchange API secrets, or wallet approvals
